title: Opendoor Technologies Q1 2024 Earnings Results
text: Opendoor Technologies (NASDAQ: OPEN) exceeded analyst expectations in its first quarter 2024 earnings report. Key Metrics: Earnings Per Share: The company reported -12 cents, surpassing the analyst estimate of -16 cents. Revenue: The company generated $1.18 billion in revenue, outperforming the analyst projection of $1.09 billion by approximately 8.35%. Summary: Opendoor delivered better-than-expected results on both top and bottom lines. The real estate technology company's revenue beat demonstrates stronger operational performance, while the EPS result showed improved profitability relative to expectations, though the company remained unprofitable for the quarter.
